channel.title: Architecture on jmpargana
channel.description: Recent content in Architecture on jmpargana

item.title: MiniTube - Presigned URLs - Insanely Useful Pattern for Sharing Data
item.description:
This post is part of my MiniTube series. Check out other related posts if you find this content useful.

Presigning

I’ve gone over signing as a useful strategy to overcome extra network calls when you want to prove you have permission to do something in regards of someone else. Presigning achieves the same goals, but with a few more cherries on top.

MiniTube

If you haven’t read my other posts on this topic. I’ve implemented a miniature video streaming architecture based on the system design interview by hello interview.

item.title: OAuth2 Explained
item.description:
I’ve recently integrated a provider and consumer service with Azure AD and B2C. Setting up the scopes was confusing and since I’ve felt that although I’ve been using OAuth in my systems for a long time, I haven’t really understood it well, I decided to invest some time and really learn how it works under the hood.

I could claim that reading the various RFCs offered clarity, but that wouldn’t be accurate. The key reason they didn’t is that there’s no single cohesive document explaining the core concepts. It’s spread around multiple ones:
